waits.waitFor: SRM settlement management/search screen is visible
waits.evidence: A settlement search form or management title is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not use fixed sleeps unless there is no observable state.

waits.evidence: Target row, explicit no-result message, or validation error is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not assume query completed because the click returned.

waits.waitFor: Target settlement row evidence is visible
waits.evidence: Settlement id, current status, supplier/company context, and amount are visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not select or confirm a row that cannot be tied to the current settlement id.

waits.waitFor: Address or confirmation dialog is either handled or explicitly absent
waits.evidence: Dialog choice is captured before submit, or absence is recorded after opening confirmation.
waits.antiPattern: Auto mode must not skip dialogs that affect submitted business state.

waits.evidence: Reviewer approval is recorded before the final confirmation action.
waits.antiPattern: Auto mode must not skip final confirmation approval.

waits.waitFor: SRM confirmation success message or confirmed status is visible
waits.evidence: Current-run success message plus settlement id/final status are visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not claim COMPLETE without current-run confirmation evidence or explicit blocked state.
